title: The Hitchhikers Guide to the Galaxy
author: Douglas Adams
description: A man's adventure when navigating the destruction of the world

title: I Am Pilgrim
author: Terry Haynes
description: A retired espionage agent, he's recruited once again to save America; a race through the Middle East to prevent a biological war

title: Pride and Prejudice
author: Jane Austen
description: A woman's prejudice against a man, and a man's pride in apologising.
